_comment: AskBill-sourced canonical JSON samples per Plaid endpoint, used by the api-panel-audit stage for endpoints live-api-capture cannot exercise (async CRA reports, etc.). Auto-populated and refreshed (TTL via API_PANEL_AUDIT_CACHE_TTL_DAYS). Safe to delete to force a refresh.
